name: cdl-ticket-management-workflow
description: MASFactory directed graph formalising the 8-step pipeline from CLAUDE.md Section 6. Node IDs match .claude/agents/ filenames exactly. Escalation loops defined in .claude/skills/implement-feature.md.

nodes.description: MANDATORY Step 0. Decomposes request into traceable user stories with acceptance criteria. Traces to docs/. Human sign-off required before any work begins.
Step 1. System design: DB schema, API contract, component tree per story. Checks supabase_schema.sql conventions and docs/API_SPECIFICATION.md.
Step 2. MANDATORY for UI changes. Screen specs, interaction flows, accessibility checklists, design tokens. Skip for backend-only changes.
Step 3. Implements backend services (Node.js/Express 5) and frontend components (Angular 21 signals, OnPush, standalone). Checks HARD_BUGS_REGISTRY.md before writing code.
Step 4. Writes Jest tests (backend/__tests__/), Angular .spec.ts co-located tests, and Cypress E2E. Enforces Sprint Testing Mandate: every modified file gets a test.
Step 5. Security audit (OWASP Top 10, RLS multi-tenancy, Stripe webhook validation), DRY enforcement, performance (N+1, indexes, <200ms p95), WCAG 2.1 AA.
nodes.output_format:
Verdict: APPROVED | CHANGES REQUIRED | BLOCKED
Checklist Summary: Security PASS/FAIL, Code Quality PASS/FAIL, Performance PASS/FAIL, Accessibility PASS/FAIL, Architecture PASS/FAIL

nodes.condition_rule: Parse 'Verdict:' line from critic output. APPROVED = pass. CHANGES REQUIRED or BLOCKED = fail.
nodes.description: Routes back to dev-lead (fail) or forward to docs-writer (pass). Max 3 critic iterations before escalating to user.
Step 6. Updates docs/API_SPECIFICATION.md, docs/04_FUNCTIONAL_REQUIREMENTS.md, HARD_BUGS_REGISTRY.md, sprint story files. Keeps project documentation in sync with implementation.
Step 7. Creates branch (feat/<name>), commits with conventional commit format, opens PR. Requires human approval before any push to main.

edges.payload: Scoped user stories with acceptance criteria, traced to docs/ references
Schema + API contract + component tree. UX Expert produces screen specs.
Direct path for backend-only: schema, API contract, implementation spec
Screen specs, component mappings, accessibility checklist, design tokens
List of all created/modified files. Sprint Testing Mandate: every file needs a test.
Test files created, test commands run, coverage summary
Verdict: APPROVED | CHANGES REQUIRED | BLOCKED. Checklist summary with PASS/FAIL per category.
Critical issues and warnings from critic. Dev Lead fixes → qa-tester retests → critic re-reviews. Max 3 iterations.
Feature summary for docs update: which API endpoints changed, which requirements fulfilled
Docs updated. Ready for branch + commit + PR creation. Human approval required.
